programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts the quiz show, which sees a team of tram workers from Sheffield answering questions about top 10 lists from the realms of popular culture and general knowledge, then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: The Bidding Room
programme.desc: Nigel Havers presents as five more sellers enter the Bidding Room. First in is Jack with some 1940 stained-glass library dividers followed by Geoff with a racing tricycle. Terri and Natalie bring a chest full of Sindy house furniture and Kevin presents the dealers with an interesting painting linked to a famous artist. Last in is Caroline with a vintage copper milking machine

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson and antiques dealers Ian Towning, Brenda Haller and David Hakeney visit Ulverston near the Lake District, where a rocking horse is sold at auction to raise money for a local hospice

programme.title: Infinity Pool (2023)
programme.desc: James and Em Foster are enjoying an all-inclusive beach vacation on the island of La Tolqa. However, a fatal accident exposes the resorts perverse subculture of hedonistic tourism, reckless violence and surreal horrors. Horror mystery, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Mia Goth, Cleopatra Coleman and Thomas Kretschmann

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Southbridge, Massachusetts, where he checks into the Vienna Inn, an Austrian-themed hotels and restaurant. Owners Jonathan and Lisa Krach have seen their cluttered inn acquire a negative reputation among the locals, and as a result, business isnt what it used to be. Can Gordon turn things round and keep the doors to this historic hotel open?

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: With the final getting ever closer, the handcuffed couples face a new challenge: their first holiday away together. Jonathan Ross sends them across the UK on iconic British breaks, from beautiful canal trips to camping in the wild countryside, and enjoying all the fun of the fair at the great British seaside. On neutral territory, and without friends and family around, how do they cope with just their cuff-partner for company?

programme.title: Stacey Solomons Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Newlyweds Shariqa and Imani have struggled to keep their renovation project on schedule or on budget in Cambridgeshire. They dream of transforming their characterless 1970s semi-detached home into a timeless, classy home with a period feel. But with just £10,000 to add a kitchen and transform the ground floor, Stacey has her work cut out. To help Shariqa and Imani get over the line, she encourages them to take on ambitious DIY tasks, including tiling with tricky marble tiles, creating their own panelling and building flat-pack kitchen units. Stacey also brings them money-saving design ideas from colour suggestions to clever hacks using off-the-shelf items to create bespoke built-in furniture. At Pickle Cottage, Stacey takes the plunge to learn new plumbing skills as part of her project to upgrade an indoor-outdoor space shes doing up in her own home

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer try to solve the problems of first-time buyers in north London. Kirstie tries to end the house-hunting misery of Ify Okoye, who has viewed 90 properties without success. Meanwhile, Phil assists a couple looking to settle down in England after six years abroad - but discovers their ambitions may put their budget under serious strain

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug smashes into Kelly and Deacons car, causing untold damage and a war of words on what should have been a pleasant evening out. Meanwhile, Kirby teases Spence when he discovers he has an allergy to nuts. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is invited to a company gathering, where Doug impresses the other lawyers partners with tales of his fictitious mountaineering exploits. Back at home, Arthur wrecks their bedroom and enlists Deacons help in repairing the damage before they return

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug decorates the house for Halloween against Arthurs wishes - and then regrets it when the old man has a heart attack. Meanwhile, Deacon wants to buy a comic-book character costume for his son, but is frustrated to find there arent any black superheroes. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Robert asks if he can borrow the suitcase sitting on the stairway landing, Ray explains he and Debra have been locked in a two-week battle of wills over who is responsible for putting the item away. Ray Romano and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Marie shame Ray into giving Robert a second bachelor party to make up for his disappointing first attempt

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part one of two. Robert and Amy prepare to tie the knot in a classic Barone family wedding ceremony - but the groom becomes suspicious when his future brother-in-law Peter tries to make peace with both him and Ray. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Unemployed Roz is reduced to borrowing money from Frasier, but he thinks she is spending it irresponsibly. Meanwhile, rumours circulate that KACL is rehiring staff. Comedy, starring Peri Gilpin and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A friendly woman comes to Frasiers rescue when hes out Christmas shopping. He offers to return the favour, but the last thing he expects is to end up on a blind date with her daughter - while pretending to be Jewish. Meanwhile, Niles takes part in a festive pageant

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A series of good deeds backfires, embroiling Frasier in a humiliating scandal and causing him to question his faith in human nature. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Greg Jenner, Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen, Ritu Arya and Babatunde Aleshe. With music from Foy Vance

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After Santas Little Helper bites Marge, the Simpsons explore the tragic past of their family dog

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart begins spying on the neighbours through Lisas telescope while recovering from an injury, and is alarmed to see something that convinces him Ned Flanders has murdered his wife

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa applies for a prestigious position in the school band, but loses out to new classmate Allison - who starts outstripping her in the popularity stakes. Upset at being relegated to second place, she resorts to sabotage in a bid to beat her rival. With the guest voice of Winona Ryder

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Patricia and Mark from East Sussex are keen to move to a country that Mark has lots of connections with. They have set their sights on Lazio in Italy, so Laura Hamilton showcases the best of what their £330,000 budget can get them in that region

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.sub-title: A VW and a Bomb Shelter
programme.desc: George explores more inspirational and ingenious amazing spaces. A father in Norfolk renovates a Volkswagen van to surprise his camping-mad kids, while a couple on the Isle of Wight turn a brick bomb shelter into a bijou bar. Master craftsman Will Hardie checks out a Russian-inspired Grayson Perry creation on the banks of the River Stour in Essex. Plus, George and Will move one step closer to completing their studio flat prototype

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: A steam engine enthusiast embarks on an ambitious coast-to-coast journey across Devon, travelling across the countys rolling hills in an 80-year-old steamroller with a top speed of eight miles per hour. Farmers on Dartmoor rear a rare breed of sheep, while at Falmouth, a group of free divers explores a spectacular underwater cave

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Toy Story (1995)
programme.desc: A jealous string-pulled cowboy dolls status as his owners favourite plaything is threatened by the arrival of a charismatic hi-tech astronaut figure, who refuses to believe he is simply a toy. However, the rivals are forced to work together when they are left stranded in the outside world. Pixar animated adventure, featuring the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Don Rickles and Jim Varney

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Cherish Finden from Bake Off: The Professionals joins Paul Hollywood in judging the celebrity charity challenge. In a returning comedians special, reigning star baker Joe Wilkinson, Roisin Conaty, Rose Matafeo, Judi Love, Tom Davis and Jon Richardson enter the tent. They attempt breakfast pastries and matcha and yuzu biscuits, before recreating the weirdest places that theyve ever slept, in cake form

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Adventure reality series where contestants hunt each other through a forest, with one side winning if they can evade detection and the other seeking to capture them. In this opening episode, the players arrive at basecamp and meet for the very first time before being split into prey and predators. As the first hunt gets underway, an initial alliance is shattered by betrayal

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Married at First Sight Australia, The Summit, LOL: Last One Laughing UK, Boarders, I Swear, Wheel of Fortune and Melania

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Daters who believe its never too late to find that elusive spark, including Cornwall romantics Mark and Josie, single mum Maisie and guarded Dan, and gaming duo Joe and Rebecca

programme.title: The French Dispatch (2021)
programme.desc: Wes Andersons anthology drama, following the American staff of a magazine based in a French town where the scent of revolution hangs in the air. When the editor dies, the staff including a travel writer, a cartoonist and a copy editor reminisce on the publications golden years and prepare words of wisdom for a final edition. Starring Bill Murray, Benicio Del Toro, Tilda Swinton and Jeffrey Wright

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Harpers Ferry in West Virginia, where he tries to save the Towns Inn, a historic hotel run by retired teacher and junk hoarder Karan Townsend. She has accumulated so many useless belongings that there is hardly any room to accommodate guests. Can Gordon convince her to get rid of her clutter or will the hotel continue to go down the pan?

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: Jonathan Ross presents the final of the reality challenge. With £100,000 at stake, the remaining couples take part in several challenges designed to test their friendships to the limit. Along the way, some of them are eliminated, leaving only the strongest to take on the final test - a race from Scotland to London with no phones and no money

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart begins spying on the neighbours through Lisas telescope while recovering from an injury, and is alarmed to see something that convinces him Ned Flanders has murdered his wife

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa applies for a prestigious position in the school band, but loses out to new classmate Allison - who starts outstripping her in the popularity stakes. Upset at being relegated to second place, she resorts to sabotage in a bid to beat her rival. With the guest voice of Winona Ryder

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help more people trying to buy a home, beginning in west London. Newlyweds Keon and Zoe are looking for a family house in Shepherds Bush with space for their hobby of salsa dancing, but even with a budget of £450,000 this will be a challenge for Phil. Kirstie is scouting for properties in the borough of Richmond for Carolyn and Paul - a native of Sheffield who is struggling to get his head around Londons inflated prices

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Nicki Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam locks his keys in the bar by accident. He is unable to get into his apartment and sets about looking for somewhere to sleep for the night. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and George Wendt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier decides to prove the people of Boston will fall for anything by persuading Woody to run for mayor. However, he has second thoughts about his plan as it becomes clear how far the unworldly barmans political career could go. Comedy, starring Kesley Grammer and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A drinking session loosens a few tongues and elicits the odd surprise, including Carlas confession of a passionate night with Paul. To help her get over the shame, Sam shares a big secret of his own. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part two of two. Robert and Amy finally get married in the Barone family tradition. Brad Garrett and Monica Horan star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra complains she and Ray do not have any fun together - and persuades him to let her join him in his game of golf. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie tries to gain the upper hand in her relationship with new daughter-in-law Amy, but Debra is determined the latest Barone wife will not endure the kind of interference she has had to put up with

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz helps Frasier arrange a date between her mother and Martin, unaware they detest each other. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Show Where Woody Shows Up
programme.desc: Woody pays Frasier a surprise visit and the friends become nostalgic about old times in a certain Boston bar. With a guest appearance by Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: An episode consisting of three Valentines Day stories. Frasier takes his station manager to dinner, but cannot work out whether she has a personal or professional interest in him. Niles plans for a romantic evening are dashed, while Martin and Daphne commiserate with each other in their loneliness. Guest starring Virginia Madsen (Sideways)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles hires a new lawyer to represent him in his divorce case when Maris tries to postpone the settlement. However, the attorney warns him that his unrequited passion for Daphne could harm his chances in court - and so could Frasiers inability to lie

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In Spring, Texas, Gordon Ramsay tries to revamp Kings Blu Jam Cafe, which specialises in breakfast, brunch and lunch. With debts mounting, the dynamic between owner Connie and her manager and daughter Justin is described by staff members as toxic and volatile, while miscommunications and an overwhelming menu are causing problems. Can Gordon turn things around and help repair the relationship between mother and daughter in the process?

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Max McMurdo head to Herefordshire to meet George, who has been collecting for more than 70 years. Max finds a crate of vintage motor oil bottles that he thinks could be worth a small fortune

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: The Bakers get to work on setting up CCTV cameras in the goat stables, and Matt reveals plans for a low maintenance allotment, complete with a greenhouse and bird feeder. Vet Will also returns to find out if the Herdwick ewes are pregnant, and Molly and Nicola prepare some vegetable-themed cupcakes in preparation for the reveal of the farms newest addition

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Jon Kay in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Angie and Alan from Fife first met just three years ago. Since then, theyve holidayed all over Europe and they now want to fulfil their dream of buying their very first property together. Theyve chosen the beautiful Orihuela Costa in southern Spain. Jasmine Harman shows them the best of what their £60,000 budget can buy

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Spain, rookie hoteliers Jo and Ken are on a mission to boost their business, and mother and daughter Becky and Kay start a top-to-bottom renovation of a bed and breakfast. In Bulgaria, father-and-son duo Colin and Paul take on a derelict farm

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins in a Lancashire glampsite that boasts hot tubs, cinema screens and pizza ovens. But a hair-raising discovery puts a dent in the cleanliness score

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This weeks competition comes from the West Country, where first to host is holiday-obsessed Kirstein who serves up a hearty, home cooked, Grecian-themed evening

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next?
programme.desc: Sara Damergi revisits a former house hunter who settled in Malta, while Ben Hillman is on the Costa Blanca to see a couple who secured their dream townhouse in 2021

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Batch from Scratch: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Suzanne Mulholland and Joe Swash come to the aid of a fitness-mad Surrey couple whose contrasting cooking styles are putting a strain on their relationship. On the menu are Mexican frittata, lamb traybake and a tag-team paella, plus Suzannes ultimate batching trick - five freezer-ready chicken meals rustled up in minutes

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The players discover who is the first to be culled. The group barely have time to recover from this shocking revelation before day two dawns and the hunt begins again. One friendship faces the ultimate test in the heat of the moment, while the breaking of a secret deal leads to a fiery clash back at base. With loyalties divided and trust called into question, the players with power must choose who to keep in the contest

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Cherish Finden from Bake Off: The Professionals joins Paul Hollywood in judging the celebrity charity challenge. In a returning comedians special, reigning star baker Joe Wilkinson, Roisin Conaty, Rose Matafeo, Judi Love, Tom Davis and Jon Richardson enter the tent. They attempt breakfast pastries and matcha and yuzu biscuits, before recreating the weirdest places that theyve ever slept, in cake form

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents as 22-year-old Ukrainian refugee Mariia enters the studio. Since fleeing the war, the pansexual sex therapist has settled in the UK and is now looking for love with a far-from-average man or woman who can keep up with her in the bedroom. She is followed by 24-year-old Alannah, a content creator from Bristol, who is seeking a forever bloke who can speak the language of love and feels comfortable in his body

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Married couple Tom and Kirsty are looking to try new things. With Kirstys support, Tom wants to sexually experiment with another man but having no previous experience with men leaves him worrying the fantasy wont live up to the reality. Meanwhile, childhood sweethearts Natalie and Tom continue their stay at the retreat and find themselves with a final chance to have a threesome with resident Precious, but Natalies insecurities could prove an insurmountable barrier

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the Beachfront Inn and Inlet, a Caribbean-style resort hotel in Fort Pierce, Florida. Young and inexperienced owner Brian is making guests time at the hotel miserable with dusty rooms, late-night concerts and poor service. Can Gordon prevent the business from going under?

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: In the 1970s, business mogul Emma Harte reflects on her childrens betrayal and her past entanglements with the Fairleys, taking the story back to the 1910s. With Edwin having been sent away, Emma uses her knowledge of the Fairley family to get ahead in the household. But when her friend Mac announces he is leaving, she spies an opportunity to escape too. Meanwhile, Adeles sobriety rekindles her marriage with Adam, leading to upset when he loses interest in Olivia

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Emma hasnt been seen for six months. After Edwins betrayal, shes started a new life as a well-spoken shop assistant in the bustling market town of Armley, preparing for the arrival of her baby and working tirelessly to save a maternity fund while worrying about how to provide for her child as a single mother. Back at Fairley Hall, Edwins new fiancee, Priya notices his heartache, while Adeles condition worsens. In the 1970s, Emma confronts her eldest daughter, Edwina, the ringleader of the coup against her, and is heartbroken to discover her protegee granddaughter Paulas secret romance with Jim Fairley

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Poppy and her father Philip realise their dream of finding a holiday home in inland Andalucía that all the family can use to enjoy the Spanish sunshine. Utilising the pairs budget of £50,000, Danni lines up five fantastic options to show them

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien makes a corkscrew wine rack that has valuer Ronnie seriously impressed

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Lucas faces a tough decision in order to protect himself from his dangerous cellmate and Warren is determined to uncover the truth, no matter the cost. While Tony and Diane head to London for answers, Doms left holding the fort, but the teens have other plans. Ste returns to devastating news, a revelation leaves Warren seething, and tensions flare at The Loft. Meanwhile, when a text lands in the wrong hands, a resident is faced with a tough parenting dilemma

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Jon Kay in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Rebecca Gaines, Rebecca Loses - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Suspicions mount that Cliff has finally killed his mother, and Rebecca thinks that Mr Gaines has asked her on a date. Comedy, starring Kirstie Alley, George Wendt and Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Rebecca Gaines, Rebecca Loses - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Rebeccas misunderstanding with Mr Gaines makes her swear off men for good and the mystery of Cliffs mother is finally solved. Comedy, starring John Ratzenberger and Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: After years of searching for a millionaire, Rebecca is surprised to find herself attracted to a personable plumber, and Sam finally realises he may not be Gods gift to women after all. Guest starring Tom Berenger

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Michael stays home from school for two days in a row, causing Ray to wonder whether he is trying to avoid something. Determined to discover the truth, he deprives the youngster of television, comics and video games to sweat the answer out of him through sheer boredom

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray grow irritated by Robert and Amys over-the-top displays of affection - especially when the pair start giving them relationship advice. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Gianni is hired to do some work on the kitchen, but infuriates Debra with his laziness. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Jon Manfrellotti and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles plans a holiday at his newly acquired cabin to get over the shock of Daphnes blossoming romance with Donny, and later joins forces with a lovelorn Roz to end the couples relationship. Comedy, with David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Crane brothers plan a dinner party, but agonise over who to invite, and devise an unusual game to determine the final guest list. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Infinity Pool (2023)
programme.desc: James and Em Foster are enjoying an all-inclusive beach vacation on the island of La Tolqa. However, a fatal accident exposes the resorts perverse subculture of hedonistic tourism, reckless violence and surreal horrors. Horror mystery, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Mia Goth, Cleopatra Coleman and Thomas Kretschmann

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Southbridge, Massachusetts, where he checks into the Vienna Inn, an Austrian-themed hotels and restaurant. Owners Jonathan and Lisa Krach have seen their cluttered inn acquire a negative reputation among the locals, and as a result, business isnt what it used to be. Can Gordon turn things round and keep the doors to this historic hotel open?

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: With the final getting ever closer, the handcuffed couples face a new challenge: their first holiday away together. Jonathan Ross sends them across the UK on iconic British breaks, from beautiful canal trips to camping in the wild countryside, and enjoying all the fun of the fair at the great British seaside. On neutral territory, and without friends and family around, how do they cope with just their cuff-partner for company?

programme.title: Stacey Solomons Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Newlyweds Shariqa and Imani have struggled to keep their renovation project on schedule or on budget in Cambridgeshire. They dream of transforming their characterless 1970s semi-detached home into a timeless, classy home with a period feel. But with just £10,000 to add a kitchen and transform the ground floor, Stacey has her work cut out. To help Shariqa and Imani get over the line, she encourages them to take on ambitious DIY tasks, including tiling with tricky marble tiles, creating their own panelling and building flat-pack kitchen units. Stacey also brings them money-saving design ideas from colour suggestions to clever hacks using off-the-shelf items to create bespoke built-in furniture. At Pickle Cottage, Stacey takes the plunge to learn new plumbing skills as part of her project to upgrade an indoor-outdoor space shes doing up in her own home

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer try to solve the problems of first-time buyers in north London. Kirstie tries to end the house-hunting misery of Ify Okoye, who has viewed 90 properties without success. Meanwhile, Phil assists a couple looking to settle down in England after six years abroad - but discovers their ambitions may put their budget under serious strain

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug smashes into Kelly and Deacons car, causing untold damage and a war of words on what should have been a pleasant evening out. Meanwhile, Kirby teases Spence when he discovers he has an allergy to nuts. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is invited to a company gathering, where Doug impresses the other lawyers partners with tales of his fictitious mountaineering exploits. Back at home, Arthur wrecks their bedroom and enlists Deacons help in repairing the damage before they return

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug decorates the house for Halloween against Arthurs wishes - and then regrets it when the old man has a heart attack. Meanwhile, Deacon wants to buy a comic-book character costume for his son, but is frustrated to find there arent any black superheroes. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Robert asks if he can borrow the suitcase sitting on the stairway landing, Ray explains he and Debra have been locked in a two-week battle of wills over who is responsible for putting the item away. Ray Romano and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Marie shame Ray into giving Robert a second bachelor party to make up for his disappointing first attempt

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part one of two. Robert and Amy prepare to tie the knot in a classic Barone family wedding ceremony - but the groom becomes suspicious when his future brother-in-law Peter tries to make peace with both him and Ray. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Unemployed Roz is reduced to borrowing money from Frasier, but he thinks she is spending it irresponsibly. Meanwhile, rumours circulate that KACL is rehiring staff. Comedy, starring Peri Gilpin and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A friendly woman comes to Frasiers rescue when hes out Christmas shopping. He offers to return the favour, but the last thing he expects is to end up on a blind date with her daughter - while pretending to be Jewish. Meanwhile, Niles takes part in a festive pageant

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A series of good deeds backfires, embroiling Frasier in a humiliating scandal and causing him to question his faith in human nature. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Greg Jenner, Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen, Ritu Arya and Babatunde Aleshe. With music from Foy Vance

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After Santas Little Helper bites Marge, the Simpsons explore the tragic past of their family dog

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart begins spying on the neighbours through Lisas telescope while recovering from an injury, and is alarmed to see something that convinces him Ned Flanders has murdered his wife

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa applies for a prestigious position in the school band, but loses out to new classmate Allison - who starts outstripping her in the popularity stakes. Upset at being relegated to second place, she resorts to sabotage in a bid to beat her rival. With the guest voice of Winona Ryder

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Patricia and Mark from East Sussex are keen to move to a country that Mark has lots of connections with. They have set their sights on Lazio in Italy, so Laura Hamilton showcases the best of what their £330,000 budget can get them in that region

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.sub-title: A VW and a Bomb Shelter
programme.desc: George explores more inspirational and ingenious amazing spaces. A father in Norfolk renovates a Volkswagen van to surprise his camping-mad kids, while a couple on the Isle of Wight turn a brick bomb shelter into a bijou bar. Master craftsman Will Hardie checks out a Russian-inspired Grayson Perry creation on the banks of the River Stour in Essex. Plus, George and Will move one step closer to completing their studio flat prototype

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: A steam engine enthusiast embarks on an ambitious coast-to-coast journey across Devon, travelling across the countys rolling hills in an 80-year-old steamroller with a top speed of eight miles per hour. Farmers on Dartmoor rear a rare breed of sheep, while at Falmouth, a group of free divers explores a spectacular underwater cave

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Toy Story (1995)
programme.desc: A jealous string-pulled cowboy dolls status as his owners favourite plaything is threatened by the arrival of a charismatic hi-tech astronaut figure, who refuses to believe he is simply a toy. However, the rivals are forced to work together when they are left stranded in the outside world. Pixar animated adventure, featuring the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Don Rickles and Jim Varney

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Cherish Finden from Bake Off: The Professionals joins Paul Hollywood in judging the celebrity charity challenge. In a returning comedians special, reigning star baker Joe Wilkinson, Roisin Conaty, Rose Matafeo, Judi Love, Tom Davis and Jon Richardson enter the tent. They attempt breakfast pastries and matcha and yuzu biscuits, before recreating the weirdest places that theyve ever slept, in cake form

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Adventure reality series where contestants hunt each other through a forest, with one side winning if they can evade detection and the other seeking to capture them. In this opening episode, the players arrive at basecamp and meet for the very first time before being split into prey and predators. As the first hunt gets underway, an initial alliance is shattered by betrayal

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Married at First Sight Australia, The Summit, LOL: Last One Laughing UK, Boarders, I Swear, Wheel of Fortune and Melania

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Daters who believe its never too late to find that elusive spark, including Cornwall romantics Mark and Josie, single mum Maisie and guarded Dan, and gaming duo Joe and Rebecca

programme.title: The French Dispatch (2021)
programme.desc: Wes Andersons anthology drama, following the American staff of a magazine based in a French town where the scent of revolution hangs in the air. When the editor dies, the staff including a travel writer, a cartoonist and a copy editor reminisce on the publications golden years and prepare words of wisdom for a final edition. Starring Bill Murray, Benicio Del Toro, Tilda Swinton and Jeffrey Wright

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Harpers Ferry in West Virginia, where he tries to save the Towns Inn, a historic hotel run by retired teacher and junk hoarder Karan Townsend. She has accumulated so many useless belongings that there is hardly any room to accommodate guests. Can Gordon convince her to get rid of her clutter or will the hotel continue to go down the pan?

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: Jonathan Ross presents the final of the reality challenge. With £100,000 at stake, the remaining couples take part in several challenges designed to test their friendships to the limit. Along the way, some of them are eliminated, leaving only the strongest to take on the final test - a race from Scotland to London with no phones and no money

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart begins spying on the neighbours through Lisas telescope while recovering from an injury, and is alarmed to see something that convinces him Ned Flanders has murdered his wife

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa applies for a prestigious position in the school band, but loses out to new classmate Allison - who starts outstripping her in the popularity stakes. Upset at being relegated to second place, she resorts to sabotage in a bid to beat her rival. With the guest voice of Winona Ryder

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help more people trying to buy a home, beginning in west London. Newlyweds Keon and Zoe are looking for a family house in Shepherds Bush with space for their hobby of salsa dancing, but even with a budget of £450,000 this will be a challenge for Phil. Kirstie is scouting for properties in the borough of Richmond for Carolyn and Paul - a native of Sheffield who is struggling to get his head around Londons inflated prices

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Nicki Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam locks his keys in the bar by accident. He is unable to get into his apartment and sets about looking for somewhere to sleep for the night. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and George Wendt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier decides to prove the people of Boston will fall for anything by persuading Woody to run for mayor. However, he has second thoughts about his plan as it becomes clear how far the unworldly barmans political career could go. Comedy, starring Kesley Grammer and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A drinking session loosens a few tongues and elicits the odd surprise, including Carlas confession of a passionate night with Paul. To help her get over the shame, Sam shares a big secret of his own. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part two of two. Robert and Amy finally get married in the Barone family tradition. Brad Garrett and Monica Horan star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra complains she and Ray do not have any fun together - and persuades him to let her join him in his game of golf. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie tries to gain the upper hand in her relationship with new daughter-in-law Amy, but Debra is determined the latest Barone wife will not endure the kind of interference she has had to put up with

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz helps Frasier arrange a date between her mother and Martin, unaware they detest each other. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Show Where Woody Shows Up
programme.desc: Woody pays Frasier a surprise visit and the friends become nostalgic about old times in a certain Boston bar. With a guest appearance by Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: An episode consisting of three Valentines Day stories. Frasier takes his station manager to dinner, but cannot work out whether she has a personal or professional interest in him. Niles plans for a romantic evening are dashed, while Martin and Daphne commiserate with each other in their loneliness. Guest starring Virginia Madsen (Sideways)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles hires a new lawyer to represent him in his divorce case when Maris tries to postpone the settlement. However, the attorney warns him that his unrequited passion for Daphne could harm his chances in court - and so could Frasiers inability to lie

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In Spring, Texas, Gordon Ramsay tries to revamp Kings Blu Jam Cafe, which specialises in breakfast, brunch and lunch. With debts mounting, the dynamic between owner Connie and her manager and daughter Justin is described by staff members as toxic and volatile, while miscommunications and an overwhelming menu are causing problems. Can Gordon turn things around and help repair the relationship between mother and daughter in the process?

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Max McMurdo head to Herefordshire to meet George, who has been collecting for more than 70 years. Max finds a crate of vintage motor oil bottles that he thinks could be worth a small fortune

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: The Bakers get to work on setting up CCTV cameras in the goat stables, and Matt reveals plans for a low maintenance allotment, complete with a greenhouse and bird feeder. Vet Will also returns to find out if the Herdwick ewes are pregnant, and Molly and Nicola prepare some vegetable-themed cupcakes in preparation for the reveal of the farms newest addition

programme.desc: The guys try to get people to protect them from security at a supermarket by calling out strange phrases. They also try to get strangers to agree upon their inappropriate stories

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra urges Ray to be firmer with the twins, but his heavy-handed approach to discipline soon has her backtracking. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray reluctantly agrees to do charity work at a hospital, but proves so popular with the patients that he starts spending more time with them than at home - much to wife Debras dismay. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amys mother and father turn up unexpectedly, intending to take their daughter back home with them. They are less than happy to find Ray there, let alone his parents, and the atmosphere is tense as the families take an instant dislike to each other

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy puts Robert in charge of writing invitations to their forthcoming wedding, but he tries to evade responsibility by seeking advice from Ray and Frank. They tell him his best bet is to make an appalling mess of the job so she will have to do it all herself. With Brad Garrett and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is too ill to take Ally to a pyjama party, so Ray reluctantly agrees to do the honours. Unfortunately it means coming face to face with Peggy, an old enemy who physically assaulted him during a charity event

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra wonders how Ray would cope if she met an untimely end, and picks an attractive friend to replace her as his new wife - but cannot help being hurt by his enthusiastic response to the idea

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: The comedian hosts the Saturday-night game show, as contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing a cash prize. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Cheap Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Joey and Ross date the same girl, while Monica fights tooth and nail with a fellow bride-to-be for a special wedding dress and the right to hire Chandlers favourite band for the ceremony. David Schwimmer and Courteney Cox star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey is nominated for a minor daytime drama award, Monica realises she will never again feel the thrill of a new romance and a student tells Ross he is in love with him. With Matt LeBlanc and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Ross and Monicas Cousin
programme.desc: Monica is visited by a cousin she has not seen since childhood, whose stunning looks do not go unnoticed by Chandler. Rachel and Phoebe plan a last-minute bridal party, while Joey tries to trick his way into an acting role. Guest starring Denise Richards

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Big Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel meets an old college friend and wonders whether she should confront her about a boozy incident from their past that took a dramatic and passionate turn. Meanwhile, Chandler and Ross vie to outdo one another in the tuxedo stakes for the impending wedding. Winona Ryder guest stars

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: With the wedding only four weeks away, Chandler struggles to write his vows and turns to Joey and Ross for much-needed help. Meanwhile, Monica has similar difficulties and recruits Phoebe and Rachel - but they soon get distracted and start reminiscing

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica convinces a reluctant Chandler to travel to Las Vegas to invite his estranged father to their wedding, while Rachel gets into trouble for driving Monicas Porsche. Comedy, guest starring Kathleen Turner

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Monica and Chandlers Wedding - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Chandlers nerves get the better of him on the eve of his wedding and he disappears, leading to a frantic search by Ross. Joey rehearses for a film role with a major star, while Phoebe and Rachel make a startling discovery. Comedy, guest starring Kathleen Turner, Elliott Gould and Gary Oldman

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Monica and Chandlers Wedding - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. The gang continues to search for the missing Chandler, who is still suffering a severe case of premarital jitters. Joey tries desperately to be released from his role in a major film so he can act as minister at the wedding. Gary Oldman and Kathleen Turner guest star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel tries to decide what to do next, while Phoebe takes some of the heat off her by claiming she is the one who is pregnant. Chandler has trouble on the dance floor and Joey tries to impress an important Broadway producer with his acting ability. Jennifer Aniston and Lisa Kudrow star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Red Sweater
programme.desc: Joey becomes convinced Phoebe is pregnant and proposes to her so she will not have to be a single mother - but Monica quickly tells him the truth. Meanwhile, Chandler and Ross misplace the disposable cameras used during the wedding

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel reveals the identity of the father of her baby, while Chandler and Monica go on their honeymoon, but are constantly upstaged by another couple who get preferential treatment wherever they go

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Rachels attempt to explain how they ended up in bed together descends into an argument about who made the first move - until Ross shocks everyone by announcing he captured the whole encounter on videotape. David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross is horrified to learn Rachel is going on a date with a handsome soap star, and Chandler sabotages a quirky workmates chances of promotion. Meanwhile, Phoebe is attracted to a cute but clumsy chef whom Monica plans to fire. Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Halloween Party
programme.desc: Phoebe finds herself attracted to flighty twin sister Ursulas fiance as the gang has fun at Monicas Halloween party. The Bings dress up as Catwoman and a pink bunny, and Rachel tries to kick-start her maternal instincts with a host of trick-or-treaters. Guest starring Sean Penn

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In 1996, two girls and their mother enjoying a walk in the Kent countryside were the victims of a frenzied hammer attack by Michael Stone, who left them for dead. Lin Russell and her six-year-old daughter Megan died from their injuries, but nine-year-old Josie survived and made a remarkable recovery. This film examines the events surrounding the murders and features interviews with Shaun Russell - Lins widower and the girls father - Josies close friend Lucy Gregson, her former primary school teacher Lynda Roberts and police family liaison officer Pauline Smith

programme.desc: City slicker Corey and his wife Angela kick off the series of dinner parties in Somerset at their grand Georgian home, serving up an Asian-themed menu inspired by their passion for travelling. Finally, outspoken Australian Shannon and her husband Tom host the third evening, hoping to satisfy hard-to-please Corey with their European cuisine, and win the cash prize

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from in and around Bristol compete to host the best dinner party and walk away with the cash prize of £1,000. Part-time DJ Syvieng and his partner Abbi spend the day creating some Thai classics, then on day two Adele and Daves experimental dessert throws up a few problems. The finale sees Jim and Sandra cooking up a locally sourced and rustic menu - but which of the couples will be smiling at the end of the week?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: East Anglia is the setting as another three couples try to prove they are the best when it comes to throwing a dinner party. On day two, young lovebirds Tom and Bonnie try to save their bacon with a breakfast-themed evening, before gym bunnies Neil and Emma swap weights for scales in an attempt to live up to t heir guests high expectations. But who will grab the grand?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Farm dwellers Nikki and Clive kick off the contest in East Anglia, serving up a menu of rustic fare. Self-confessed recluses, this is their first dinner party, so it remains to be seen how they cope having company round. They are followed by young couple Lloyd and Molly, who serve up a Thai menu, and bringing up the rear are Pete and Kirsty, with an evening themed around the letter P. Can they pocket the prize with perfect points? Its doubtful, but as ever itll be fun seeing how they do

programme.desc: Three couples in Luton, Bedfordshire, battle it out in the culinary contest, beginning with Bridget and her husband Peter, whose menu of tried and tested dinner party favourites leaves their rivals distinctly unimpressed. Next to host are Shawn and Kendra, who prepare dishes based on their travels, before serving up a dessert that reflects their Canadian heritage. Finally, footballer Richard and his fiancee Marina decide to cook an Italian-inspired meal - but Richard proves to be more of a hindrance than a help in the kitchen. With the trio of parties complete, the couples reconvene to decide which pair hosted the best event

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The doubles version of the culinary challenge series heads to north Devon, where busy parents Matt and Sarah are the first hosts, but their decision to serve crisps as canapes does not go down well with some of their rivals. Next up are competitive foodies James and Laura, who put together a similar menu to their predecessors - but with more flair. The final party is thrown by am-dram couple Jake and Ian, and their guests have high expectations that the pairs mushroom bruschetta starter and casserole main look set to miss

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Its hammer time in the third series where the property brothers work their makeover magic. Will helping these homeowners be as tough as nails or as easy as flipping a switch?When Francis and Juanita moved from India to Canada five years ago, they bought the first house they could afford. They still love their home, but theyve had two new additions to their family and outgrown it. While Jonathan tries to make it look brand-spanking new, Drew innovatively searches for a high-class house. Short:Francis, Juanita and their two kids still love their home but theyve outgrown it. As Jonathan tries to make it look brand-spanking new, Drew searches for a high-class house

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Reece, who is ex-military, plans an army-themed wedding with a twist. However, his fiancee Lucy has dreams of getting married in a castle. It therefore remains to be seen whether he will win her over with his military manoeuvres - or instead receive his marching orders

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Jonny plans an adrenaline-fuelled wedding for his bride-to-be Kate, who has always dreamed of a simple, sophisticated reception

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Former participants Amit Kleinberger, Randy DeWitt and Steve Greenbaum want to take another look at the everyday workings of their businesses, but fear they will be recognised. They each send an employee in their place to report on how their firms are functioning

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jeff Platt, the president and CEO of entertainment and fitness business Sky Zone, poses as a contestant on a reality TV show who is trying to win an action-adventure holiday. He aims to discover whether his fast-growing company is running as smoothly and efficiently as possible, but his secret identity is jeopardised when he encounters a colleague he has met on a previous occasion

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks into the luxurious Lakeview Hotel on Lake Chelan, Washington, where the bedrooms are empty and the hotels restaurant and ice-cream parlour are failing. Gordon confronts owner Brents inappropriate and miserly behaviour, but is it enough to repair the establishments reputation?

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Brick Hotel in Newtown, Pennsylvania, where the staff have had enough of owner Verindar, who runs the establishment like an angry tyrant. Can Gordon convince her to value her loyal workers and entice customers back to this landmark hotel?

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Its hammer time in the third series where the property brothers work their makeover magic. Will helping these homeowners be as tough as nails or as easy as flipping a switch? Mike and Steves cosy cottage was perfect when it was just them. Now, with four chaotic children, they desperately need more room. Will a 200-year-old property be exactly what theyre looking for?

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: The primary charter guest hates the decor, so the deck team scramble to turn their sailing experience around with a poetic performance. The fight over Chase continues as Diana gets closer

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.sub-title: The Lure of the Treacle Puppies

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Miles Jupp take on Jon Richardson and Rose Matafeo, while Vic Reeves joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Victoria Coren Mitchell take on Jon Richardson and James Acaster, while Morgana Robinson joins wordsmith Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark grows concerned that Jeff and Sophies work trip to Aberdeen could turn into something intimate, and attempts to stop them hooking up together. Meanwhile, Jeremy gets a new girlfriend - but is seized by fits of jealousy whenever she looks at another man. Starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark makes a new friend at the office who seems likely to broaden his horizons. Meanwhile, Jeremy meets an acquaintance from school who wants him to star in his art-house movie. David Mitchell, Robert Webb and Olivia Colman star

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Harry wants a memorial tattoo dedicated to a very intimate part of himself after surviving testicular cancer, while beautician Nicoles career is on the ropes because she has a portrait that resembles armpit hair, and Freddies Kurt Cobain portrait looks more like Jesus. Matt doodled on his own legs with a tattoo machine that his parents got him for Christmas, but needs his dodgy designs removed before his daughter finds out what they mean

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.sub-title: The Lure of the Treacle Puppies

programme.desc: Sean Lock and Miles Jupp take on Jon Richardson and Rose Matafeo, while Vic Reeves joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Paul Quentel, president of Alfred Angelo, the second largest bridal retailer in the United States, goes undercover to solve any problems as quickly as possible. Posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition, he works among his own staff

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Mike Bloom, president and COO of discount retail chain Family Dollar, intends to double its number of stores within a few years. He decides that to do so he first needs to go incognito within the organisation to monitor where the firm is excelling and where it needs improvement

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In north Devon, married couple Frankie and Jason kick off the competition. Outspoken duo Kate and Ian dont let the evenings many delays go unnoticed, and as tensions rise around the table, internet lovebirds Chris and Amy try to stay firmly out of the way. Day two sees Kate and Ian serve up a menu full of rustic French cuisine, influenced by their 22 years living in France. But a table laying mishap suggests that Kate has overtly snubbed her guests, although tensions are eased when former falconers Kate and Ian bring out one of their favourite birds of prey. Finally its dog lovers Chris and Amys turn to step up to the plate, and believing themselves to be the foodies of the group theyre confident they can bag the prize for best soiree

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fifty-somethings Lesley and Roger, music teachers Emma and Chris, and teacher and ex-soldier Bonita and Tony take part in the culinary challenge in Leicester. Highlights include an international-themed evening inspired by the couples love of luxury cruises and the youngest contestants desperate to prove they can serve up fine cuisine

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Its hammer time in the third series where the property brothers work their makeover magic. Will helping these homeowners be as tough as nails or as easy as flipping a switch?Firefighter Ryan, Lesley and their blended family desperately need more space. Theyre ready to set their property apart from the competition. But as Jonathan tackles turf trouble, will Drew be too busy with a firefighter fitness challenge? Short: Firefighter Ryan and Lesley are ready to set their property apart from the competition. But as Jonathan tackles turf trouble, will Drew be too busy with a firefighter fitness challenge?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: DJ Gordon is looking for a man to share his life with and on paper, kickboxing instructor Stephen seems like the perfect partner. Will they get on in real life? Former ballroom dancer David hopes to sweep Zoe off her feet, Paul and Samantha share a dry wit, and keen baker Holly helps fitness fanatic Ben - who had an awkward meal in the last series - to confront his fear of carbs

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Manchester player Geo is pulling out all the stops in his attempts to impress 19-year-old Heather - he even brings champagne and flowers. But how will she feel after he tells his favourite joke? Clay-pigeon enthusiast Emma seems a good match for finance broker Jeremy - but soon discovers she has to compete with his work phone - while 82-year-old Harvey isnt letting his age get in the way as he tries to win the heart of lifelong singleton Dinah

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to reverse the fortunes of the Mixing Bowl diner in Bellmore, New York, where a talented cooks work is being undone by the managers marketing plans - putting the finances in dire straits

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Lucas faces a tough decision in order to protect himself from his dangerous cellmate and Warren is determined to uncover the truth, no matter the cost. Meanwhile, when a text lands in the wrong hands, a resident is faced with a tough parenting dilemma

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire needs to get everyone out of the house as she tries to impress a reporter from a womens business magazine, while Jay attempts to spend quality time with Manny

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil, Claire, Alex and Luke love having the twins around, but find taking care of them is exhausting. However, when they realise the babies might help them with a few things on their to-do lists, they offer to give Haley the day off

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam help Lily overcome her insecurities about wearing a bathing suit to a pool party, but discover they have some of their own. Meanwhile, now that Glorias new internship is taking up so much of her time, Jay is feeling particularly neglected

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef heads to the Seascape restaurant in the village of Islip on Long Island, New York, in a bid to change the fortunes of its owner Peter Matthews, who is nearly $1million in debt. Gordon is dismayed to discover unprotected meat and fish left next to mouldy pesto jars in the kitchen and plans to close down the eatery until radical changes are made

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of a French restaurant in the heart of Moorpark, California. The pompous, over-complicated cuisine is keeping the customers away and there is an imminent threat of bankruptcy. However, the owner is vigorously opposed to change, despite the failings of his current business model

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge has plastic surgery in an effort to lose weight, but a mix-up results in her being given breast implants instead - much to Homers delight. With the guest voices of Adam West and Burt Ward, stars of 1960s TV series Batman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family takes part in a new reality TV show set in the 19th century, which proves unpopular with viewers, prompting the producers to try a series of increasingly desperate and dangerous ploys in a bid to boost ratings. With the guest voice of former boxer Larry Holmes

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart angrily breaks Lisas treasured saxophone during a petty squabble, prompting Homer and Marge to recall how she acquired it in the first place. Guest starring the voice of Fyvush Finkel

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The newly-weds move in together and face tasks designed to make them more honest with each other. But honesty isnt always the best policy

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Apus mother arrives in Springfield to organise his arranged marriage to the daughter of a family friend, but he is unwilling to have his future decided for him and pretends he already has a wife - Marge

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level (2019)
programme.desc: Players of Jumanji return, but as they attempt to rescue one of their own, they will have to brave parts unknown from arid deserts to snowy mountains, to escape the worlds most dangerous game. Director Jake Kasdans fantasy adventure sequel to his 2017 rebooted hit Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: A bus ride from New Delhi takes the teams to the second leg of the race, Indias city of love, Agra, where their first task is to deliver traditional chai tea to some office workers. Next, in a choice between two challenges, the duos must either wash laundry by hand in the Yamuna River or create bricks from a surprising source - cow dung

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A teenage Homer embarks on a road trip in the company of Grampa to look for his mother

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 19-year-old student Marlie from Yorkshire, who keeps choosing the bad boys - which is driving her mum mad. Theres also 30-year-old Adam, from Bradford. programme.desc: Marge has plastic surgery in an effort to lose weight, but a mix-up results in her being given breast implants instead - much to Homers delight. With the guest voices of Adam West and Burt Ward, stars of 1960s TV series Batman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family takes part in a new reality TV show set in the 19th century, which proves unpopular with viewers, prompting the producers to try a series of increasingly desperate and dangerous ploys in a bid to boost ratings. With the guest voice of former boxer Larry Holmes

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart angrily breaks Lisas treasured saxophone during a petty squabble, prompting Homer and Marge to recall how she acquired it in the first place. Guest starring the voice of Fyvush Finkel

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The newly-weds move in together and face tasks designed to make them more honest with each other. But honesty isnt always the best policy

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Revelations Week escalates with a confrontational task that prompts shocking confessions, brutal opinions and a blazing argument

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Ned Flanders resigns as coach of Springfields junior football team, so Homer takes his place - and tries to make up for his own childhood shortcomings on the sports field by giving Bart the role of star quarterback. Featuring the guest voices of Joe Namath and Mike Judge

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Apus mother arrives in Springfield to organise his arranged marriage to the daughter of a family friend, but he is unwilling to have his future decided for him and pretends he already has a wife - Marge

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level (2019)
programme.desc: Players of Jumanji return, but as they attempt to rescue one of their own, they will have to brave parts unknown from arid deserts to snowy mountains, to escape the worlds most dangerous game. Director Jake Kasdans fantasy adventure sequel to his 2017 rebooted hit Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: A bus ride from New Delhi takes the teams to the second leg of the race, Indias city of love, Agra, where their first task is to deliver traditional chai tea to some office workers. Next, in a choice between two challenges, the duos must either wash laundry by hand in the Yamuna River or create bricks from a surprising source - cow dung

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A teenage Homer embarks on a road trip in the company of Grampa to look for his mother

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge select Fat Tony to be Maggies godfather, but are worried about his influence on her

programme.title: The Inbetweeners Movie (2011)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Simon, Will, Jay and Neil plan a holiday to the Greek island of Crete after they finish their exams, hoping to experience drink, sex and debauchery beyond their wildest dreams. However, things do not quite work out as planned. Comedy based on the TV series, with Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum (2019)
programme.desc: The seemingly invincible hero returns, this time with a $14million bounty on his head which rises each hour, and every underworld figure around the world desperate to cash in. However, John Wick does receive support from Sofia, a fellow dog lover, assassin and manager of Casablancas Continental Hotel. Director Chad Stahelskis action thriller sequel, starring Keanu Reeves, Halle Berry and Ian McShane

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Big Brother: The Launch, Dont Look Down for SU2C, Antiques Roadshow, Coronation Street, Big Little Journeys, Beat the Chasers Celebrity Special and Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg. From October 2023

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 19-year-old student Marlie from Yorkshire, who keeps choosing the bad boys - which is driving her mum mad. Theres also 30-year-old Adam, from Bradford. Having previously had his heart broken, he is now looking for a woman with no secrets, and believes that if the contestants are willing to bare all on TV, they probably have nothing to hide

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Lucas faces a tough decision in order to protect himself from his dangerous cellmate and Warren is determined to uncover the truth, no matter the cost. While Tony and Diane head to London for answers, Doms left holding the fort, but the teens have other plans. Meanwhile, when a text lands in the wrong hands, a resident is faced with a tough parenting dilemma

programme.desc: Phil and Luke spend father-son time together searching for hidden treasures beneath the house, Mitch and Cam cause embarrassment by inviting Lilys paediatrician to lunch, and Haley takes her driving test

programme.desc: On the next leg of his Islands to Highlands tour, James travels to Devon where he meets his friend and Michelin-starred chef Simon Hulstone

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by friend and Michelin-starred chef Mark Jordan, riding around Jersey on mini motorbikes while exploring the islands culinary delights. James samples one of Jerseys most famous exports - the Jersey Royal potato - which he uses to cook up a squid risotto with a difference. Mark gets a lesson in oyster shucking and James uses Jersey black butter to create a black butter tartlet

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Twelve new contestants make their way into the famous tent, hoping they have what it takes to bake their way to the final. They start off with cake week, and a signature challenge in which they must produce 12 mini rolls, before working out the recipe for a nostalgic teatime classic in the technical. For the showstopper, the bakers are asked to express their creativity with cakes designed to defy the laws of physics. Presented by Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas, with Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its crunch time for the bakers as biscuit week arrives and they are asked to produce their take on filled brandy snaps, followed by a jammy childhood favourite in the technical challenge. In the showstopper, they have to come up with an interactive toy made entirely from biscuit. Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas find out who will be top cookie and who will crumble under the pressure, while Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present as the amateurs demonstrate their bread-baking skills, putting their own twist on a classic Italian focaccia in the signature challenge and making a Greek-inspired snack in the technical. On day two, judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith task them with creating an artistic showpiece rendering decorative designs in milk bread. Who will be leaving the tent this week?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host dessert week, which sees the amateur bakers put their twist on the classic pavlova and take on a toffee technical, before creating showpiece that involves wrapping a delicate dessert in intricately patterned sponge. Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood are on hand to taste the results - and decide who will be leaving the tent this week

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go North
programme.desc: Simon King and Dave Myers are on the Yorkshire coast. Starting on one of Scarborough beautiful beaches, the bikers meet Jamie. His company is the first one to farm seaweed offshore. In Aike, they visit a family run vineyard and winery, Laurel Vines, and borrow the familys kitchen to prepare moules mariniere, triple-cooked chips and their own northern baguette. They also visit Malton and Whitby, before preparing a final dish back in Scarborough - a beer and miso BBQ chicken with grilled, marinated aubergine

programme.desc: Ree Drummond demonstrates how to prepare a meatball and polenta casserole and hasselback chicken

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy

Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

In the technical challenge they each have to make a Charlotte Royale, a dessert made with Swiss roll and creme bavaroise, before the showstopper round sees them bake opera cakes, which consist of layers of almond sponge with coffee buttercream filling and a chocolate topping. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Contestants from last years series talk about their experiences of life inside the tent. programme.desc: On the next leg of his Islands to Highlands tour, James travels to Devon where he meets his friend and Michelin-starred chef Simon Hulstone

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by friend and Michelin-starred chef Mark Jordan, riding around Jersey on mini motorbikes while exploring the islands culinary delights. James samples one of Jerseys most famous exports - the Jersey Royal potato - which he uses to cook up a squid risotto with a difference. Mark gets a lesson in oyster shucking and James uses Jersey black butter to create a black butter tartlet

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Twelve new contestants make their way into the famous tent, hoping they have what it takes to bake their way to the final. They start off with cake week, and a signature challenge in which they must produce 12 mini rolls, before working out the recipe for a nostalgic teatime classic in the technical. For the showstopper, the bakers are asked to express their creativity with cakes designed to defy the laws of physics. Presented by Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas, with Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its crunch time for the bakers as biscuit week arrives and they are asked to produce their take on filled brandy snaps, followed by a jammy childhood favourite in the technical challenge. In the showstopper, they have to come up with an interactive toy made entirely from biscuit. Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas find out who will be top cookie and who will crumble under the pressure, while Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present as the amateurs demonstrate their bread-baking skills, putting their own twist on a classic Italian focaccia in the signature challenge and making a Greek-inspired snack in the technical. On day two, judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith task them with creating an artistic showpiece rendering decorative designs in milk bread. Who will be leaving the tent this week?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host dessert week, which sees the amateur bakers put their twist on the classic pavlova and take on a toffee technical, before creating showpiece that involves wrapping a delicate dessert in intricately patterned sponge. Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood are on hand to taste the results - and decide who will be leaving the tent this week

programme.desc: Simon King and Dave Myers are on the Yorkshire coast. Starting on one of Scarborough beautiful beaches, the bikers meet Jamie. His company is the first one to farm seaweed offshore. They also visit Malton and Whitby, before preparing a final dish back in Scarborough - a beer and miso BBQ chicken with grilled, marinated aubergine

Action thriller, starring Sylvester Stallone, Sung Kang and Christian Slater

programme.desc: The undead count is revived by the blood of an English tourist, who was lured with his wife and two friends to Draculas remote Carpathian castle by his butler. Now wanting his victims widow for his bride, he pursues her to a monastery, where she has sought sanctuary - but reckons without the intervention of a brave clergyman. Hammer horror, with Christopher Lee, Barbara Shelley, Andrew Keir, Francis Matthews and Philip Latham

programme.desc: A ranch owner loses half his home in a poker game, meaning he now has to share the property with his rival gambler. The pair struggle to cope with living and working together, and when they both take a liking to the same woman, the conflict only gets worse. Comedy Western, starring Dean Cain, James Tupper and Allison Hossack

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Much to his colleagues amusement and BAs irritation, Murdock is revered as a god on a remote island where natives are being forced to mine diamonds by a gang of ruthless mercenaries. Action adventure, starring Dwight Schultz and George Peppard

programme.desc: The soldiers of fortune protect a girl being hunted by the KGB for top-secret documents relating to the Star Wars project. Action adventure, starring Mr T and George Peppard

programme.desc: A gunslinger renounces his violent ways and vows never to kill again. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Barbara Britton and Bruce Cabot

programme.title: Monte Walsh (2003)
programme.desc: A ranch hand prides himself on his ability to tame horses and drive cattle, but as the world around him becomes increasingly industrialised, he is confronted with the realisation that his skills are no longer required.
