programme.desc: A man believes his days are numbered when his beloved grandfather clock begins to wind down

programme.title: D-Tox (2002)
programme.desc: A bereaved FBI agent turns to alcohol to cope with the unsolved murder of his girlfriend and is sent to an isolated rehab clinic to recuperate. Unfortunately, it soon becomes clear that her killer has followed him and is intent on picking off his fellow patients one by one - forcing him to pull himself together in a bid to prevent more deaths. Thriller, with Sylvester Stallone, Polly Walker, Tom Berenger and Kris Kristofferson

programme.title: Rambo (2008)

Action sequel, directed by and starring Sylvester Stallone. With Julie Benz and Graham McTavish

programme.title: War on the Range (2015)
programme.desc: A troubled Confederate veteran returns home to find himself embroiled in a conflict between his family and the brutish cattle rancher harassing them. Western thriller, starring James Badge Dale and Ethan Embry

programme.title: The Buccaneer (1958)

His only hope is to form an alliance with a notorious pirate - but while the buccaneers loyalties are to his homeland, his crew urges him to side with the invaders. Remake of Cecil B DeMilles classic swashbuckling adventure, directed by Anthony Quinn, starring Yul Brynner, Charlton Heston, Claire Bloom and Charles Boyer

programme.title: Island of Terror (1966)
programme.desc: A pathologist investigates a series of gruesome deaths on a small island. He discovers that an experiment carried out by a group of doctors trying to find a cure for cancer has created a race of mutant creatures that suck the bones from the bodies of their human prey. Horror, starring Peter Cushing and Edward Judd

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.sub-title: Let That Be Your Last Battlefield

programme.title: The Invaders

Action thriller, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Natasha Henstridge, Zach Grenier, Jean-Hugues Anglade and Paul Ben-Victor

However, when he turns up at the farm where his ill-gotten gains are hidden, he finds the widowed owner and her children are being threatened by unscrupulous businessmen who want her land, so he resolves to stay and defend the family. Action adventure, with Jean-Claude Van Damme and Rosanna Arquette

programme.title: Best of the Best

programme.title: Buried (2010)
programme.desc: An American truck driver working in Iraq is kidnapped by guerrillas, who seal him in a wooden box and bury it in the desert. Discovering his cell phone has been left in the box with him, he uses this fragile link to the outside world to try to get help - but his supply of air is running low and even he does not know where he is. Thriller, starring Ryan Reynolds

Sci-fi thriller, starring Kirk Acevedo

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman who has to dial 999 because of pains in her chest and shortness of breath. When a patient is found unresponsive at home and with no reaction to pain, a second crew is called as she needs to be urgently transported to hospital. A patient with low blood pressure is found on the kitchen floor. She needs to go to hospital but its her mothers funeral tomorrow and shes refusing to go

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A mans tongue swells to twice its normal size, and a postal worker who walks 15 miles a day is on the floor unable to move with painful spasms in his back. An intoxicated patient verbally abuses one of the paramedics, an ECG tracing reveals that a patient is having a heart attack, and a man receiving chemotherapy is running a high temperature and may have developed sepsis

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Single father Gary, 47, is put in a medically induced coma at Kings College Hospital to reduce the risk of brain damage following a serious motorcycle accident, and 69-year-old Steve confronts his fear of needles when a nurse has to remove a fishbone stuck in his finger. Meanwhile, 58-year-old lung cancer patient Terry is in AandE with his carer Sandy, a year after being given two weeks to live

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Scaffolder Thomas arrives at Londons Kings College Hospital after suffering a head injury at a building site and doctors are concerned he may have fractured his skull, back or neck. Hilton, 85, has diabetes and is worried about his swollen legs, and retired architect Edgar is struggling to breathe following an asthma attack. Meanwhile, in the waiting room, two women make friends and swap stories and jokes

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Michelle plans a day at the beach but unexpectedly ends up taking the gang high into the mountains for a day of impromptu abseiling and zipwiring. A day of tantrums and tears may spell disaster for the grandmother from Birmingham

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Edinburgh, the first host is 37-year-old Canadian comedian Larah, who hopes to bag herself the prize with a night of fine dining. She aims to impress 38-year-old pilot James, 37-year-old cafe owner Nutan, 26-year-old salesman Sindiso and 42-year-old security manager Anne

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second night from the competition in Edinburgh, and cafe owner Nutan is hoping her happy-go-lucky attitude will have her laughing all the way to the bank

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third host of the week in Edinburgh is South-African born family man Sindiso, who hopes an evening of fun inspired by his homeland will win him the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Edinburgh security company manager Anne hopes her homely, relaxed night in will be enough to win the £1,000 prize - but rising tensions between the guests may scupper her chances

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final night in Edinburgh, and pilot James is hoping a touch of sophistication in his high-flying menu will see him land safely in first place. However, after the previous nights tension, his main concern is keeping any potential explosions contained. Guests Anne and Larah have a suspicion he could be serious competition. Will James manage to produce excellent food and keep the peace, leading him to victory?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retirees Kay and Barry have decided its time to fulfil their dream of buying a holiday home in the historic city of Jerez in southern Spain. With a budget of £105,000, they want an apartment close to all the action. Jasmine Harman lines up five excellent properties for the pair to choose between

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe helps Lesley and Ken, who have downsized their house in the UK to free up some cash to buy a holiday home on the Caribbean island of Barbados. Property expert Craig shows them the best of what their £350,000 budget can secure

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Lian and Dave, a couple with a 13-year-old son, search for a holiday home in Spains Almería Province on a budget of £80,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps motorbike enthusiast Jennie look for a home on the western Costa del Sol. With a budget of £85,000, Laura lines up five impressive properties

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Lindleys from Ashtead, Surrey. Having built up his business empire from home, cyber security expert Bill has inadvertently taken over their detached bungalow, and retired civil servant Pippa has had enough. She dreams of moving to Kent, where they can be closer to family and the coast

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of house-hunters searching the Reading area. Kirstie is with Chloe, who wants a place in the trendy suburb of Caversham, and is joined on her search by her father Clive. However, after two years of looking and 60 properties viewed, the pair are struggling. Phil teams up with teachers Richard and Jo, who need to find a family home before term starts. But it needs to be a property good enough to get Richard excited

programme.title: George Clarkes Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: George kicks off a new series by paying a visit to solicitor Dawn, who is embarking on a mammoth renovation of her local village shop in Yorkshire, in a bid to turn it into a home for her and her two sons. But with a six-month deadline, no renovating experience and ambitious plans, including turning a storage room into an outdoor oasis, will her on paper plans work in the real world?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Sherbourne House Hotel in Attleborough, Norfolk, where some of the guests find the rooms a little too hot - resulting in some unwelcome feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals arrive at Holywell House in Loughborough, Leicestershire, where musical theatre lovers Lez Cope-Newman and Derek Hunter hope to win them over with a show-stopping stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: A visit to the Greyhound Hotel in Cromford, Derbyshire, where mother and daughter Tina and Danielle Waddingham are hoping their fellow BandBers will be roused by their renovations

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Royal Hotel, in Clacton-on-Sea, Essex, where General Manager Vicki Hart and Events Manager Kara Cross hope to wow the guests with their boutique seafront hotel. Everyone laps up the luxury rooms, but in the evening, talk turns tense with accusations of foul play. In the morning, a noisy night and a dry shower cause troubles for Tina and Danielle. At breakfast, the sausages and bacon become a bone of contention for some guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The holiday hosts meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores. Feedback ranges from sleep issues and beef about breakfast bothers, to tabletop troubles and Dereks slumber sorrows. Strong opinions are aired and differences debated, before the winner is finally announced

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman whos passed out for the third time that day, and a man in his 40s with chest pain and a family history of heart failure that could be causing him anxiety. A man is found intoxicated and collapsed in the street, and a woman trips on some stairs and badly cuts her head

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 74-year-old man is rushed in with suspected sepsis and his wife shares her experience as his full-time carer. Sixty-one-year-old Jillian comes in after a fall and recalls when her husband was diagnosed with stage four bowel cancer. Keith arrives with a fast heart rate and while staff urgently try to bring it down his wife talks about raising deaf children and being diagnosed with the deaf gene

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Hospital staff at Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham treat three female university students who have been victims of a spate of needle-spiking attacks. Twenty year-old Kate is rushed in after collapsing in a nightclub and having to receive CPR from a friend when she stopped breathing normally. In the Urgent Treatment Unit 19 year-old Pavni and 21-year-old Sarah meet while waiting for treatment after what they suspect to be needle-spiking. While being treated Pavni talks about the racist abuse she faced growing up and Sarah reveals the impact COVID-19 has had on her university experience

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman whos passed out for the third time that day, and a man in his 40s with chest pain and a family history of heart failure that could be causing him anxiety. A man is found intoxicated and collapsed in the street, and a woman trips on some stairs and badly cuts her head

While being treated Pavni talks about the racist abuse she faced growing up and Sarah reveals the impact COVID-19 has had on her university experience

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Blackburn chemistry teacher and self-confessed culture-vulture Shabaz leads his rivals on a tour of Portos historical sights, before a performance of fado - melancholy Portuguese music that looks set to give the others the blues

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Brigitte Tee, who runs four-star BandB Gorse Meadow in the New Forest, hosts the first round of the competition. Her guests are initially charmed by her eccentric personality, but the discovery of a bathroom window in need of repair and another room containing ladybirds, cobwebs and dust soon takes the shine off their stay

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Suffolk, Henry Cole and Simon OBrien meet former agony aunt Janet, whose garden shed is crammed with goodies. With no motors to unearth, Henry makes a rare furniture discovery, while Simon finds a vintage tram bench

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton meets Andi and Neil from York, who dream of retiring permanently to Spain with their son Joel and spaniel Dixie. Theyre looking for a three-bedroom house with a dog-friendly garden, where barbeque enthusiast Neil can cook up a storm close to the beach close to the coastal town of Mazarron, near Murcia. Laura has five sizzling options for their budget of £145,000, but will any of them turn out to be their new forever home?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition comes from in and around Belfast, where the first host is chatty PR manager Claire. She aims to impress with a menu made up of her favourite restaurant dishes, but never having plucked a pheasant before, she has a challenge on her hands. The guests shes hoping to impress are DJ Ryan, joiner and part-time inventor Neil, charity events manager Cailin, and window cleaning manager Paul, on a lively night filled with laughter, music and dancing

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Carpenter Neil hosts the second dinner party in and around Belfast in a bid to win the £1000 prize, presenting good old fashioned, country style cuisine to his guests. With a farmyard full of animals joining in the fun, discussions ranging from disabled chickens to eating stinging nettles and a guest performance from Neils very own creation, head in a jar, its proves to be a weird and wonderful experience out in the countryside

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Debonair window cleaning business owner and keen golfer Paul has cut a dash already this week in and around Belfast with his sense of style, and now he hopes to impress with his fine food. For Ryan and Neil, most of the fancy fare is uncharted territory, and while Cailin and Claire are impressed with the fine dining, Paul sails close to the wind when he suggests that they might like to be his ladies-in-waiting

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Livewire DJ and events organiser Ryan is the next to host in and around Belfast - and having arranged parties for thousands, is confident he can satisfy four fellow diners. Eccentric joiner Neil anticipates a madcap evening of fun, and with a hipster band playing in the living room, unexpected discoveries in the bedroom and several crises in the kitchen, certainly gets the entertainment he was hoping for

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Belfast, Cailin hosts a Eurovision extravaganza. Her rivals have provided top-notch nosh and entertainment, but she believes that her tried-and-tested dishes from across Europe will land her the top spot

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to The Swan Inn, in Midhurst, West Sussex, where guests enjoy an alfresco breakfast in the market square - and encounter a shocking hidden cupboard

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The battling BandB owners visit Osterley Park Hotel in Isleworth, where owner Sunny Pharroda reveals that hospitality was not his first career, leading to some tough questions about his suitability as a host. To make matters worse, as the guests prepare for bed, one contestant makes an early checkout

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals turn up at Plover Cottage in Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, where they are amazed by the space, although Liz and Gary find more than they bargained for in their room and the self-catering conditions are a concern for some of the guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to The Forge Guest Rooms in Long Whatton, Leicestershire, owned by Liz and Gary Scottorn. The guests love the luxury, but Cleide questions eating breakfast beside a hot tub. In the evening, theres drama over drinks as Sunny causes Liz to defend her levels of cleanliness. At breakfast, Sunny isnt sure how to work the cooking facilities. Cleide and John feel cramped eating croissants leading to consternation come feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Criticisms and comments are all laid bare, as Digby reveals how much he paid for a room he didnt even spend the night in. Cleide also defends her decision not to offer welcome packs on arrival. After opinions are aired and differences debated, the payments are revealed and the winner is finally announced

programme.title: Car S.O.S.

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: The planners agree that renovation can now extend into the adjacent barn, Anty Johns is set to become a four-bedroom family home, heaping even more pressure on builder Richard. Amanda and historian Derek head off to meet distant Clarkson relative Dorothy, eager to hunt down any leads relating to former resident Anthony Clarksons elusive diaries

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The staff of Kings College Hospital reflect on the different ways in which people deal with physical and emotional pain as they treat a new batch of patients. Ahmed, 28, dislocated his shoulder during a game of American football and grits his teeth as a doctor slots it back into place. Meanwhile, 24-year-old Lee is living with Behcets disease, a condition that affects his nervous system and causes pain so severe he passes out, and father-of-four Simon, 30, has been found unconscious at the bottom of a stairwell and it emerges he hasnt eaten for days following a relationship break-up

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Sarah, 35, arrives at Kings College Hospital concerned that a brain tumour she first had as a teenager has returned. Helen, 47, is worried about her baby son James, who was born with a hole in his heart and one kidney, and has been vomiting since the morning, while 28-year-old Wayne seeks treatment for knife wounds to his leg after he tried to stop someone stealing his girlfriends phone

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called out to a young woman whos had a panic attack while driving to work and pulls over in the middle of rush-hour traffic. programme.title: 999: On the Front Line

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Michelle plans a day at the beach but unexpectedly ends up taking the gang high into the mountains for a day of impromptu abseiling and zipwiring. A day of tantrums and tears may spell disaster for the grandmother from Birmingham

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Edinburgh, the first host is 37-year-old Canadian comedian Larah, who hopes to bag herself the prize with a night of fine dining. She aims to impress 38-year-old pilot James, 37-year-old cafe owner Nutan, 26-year-old salesman Sindiso and 42-year-old security manager Anne

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third host of the week in Edinburgh is South-African born family man Sindiso, who hopes an evening of fun inspired by his homeland will win him the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Edinburgh security company manager Anne hopes her homely, relaxed night in will be enough to win the £1,000 prize - but rising tensions between the guests may scupper her chances

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final night in Edinburgh, and pilot James is hoping a touch of sophistication in his high-flying menu will see him land safely in first place. programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

But with a six-month deadline, no renovating experience and ambitious plans, including turning a storage room into an outdoor oasis, will her on paper plans work in the real world?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Sherbourne House Hotel in Attleborough, Norfolk, where some of the guests find the rooms a little too hot - resulting in some unwelcome feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals arrive at Holywell House in Loughborough, Leicestershire, where musical theatre lovers Lez Cope-Newman and Derek Hunter hope to win them over with a show-stopping stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: A visit to the Greyhound Hotel in Cromford, Derbyshire, where mother and daughter Tina and Danielle Waddingham are hoping their fellow BandBers will be roused by their renovations

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The holiday hosts meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores. programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 74-year-old man is rushed in with suspected sepsis and his wife shares her experience as his full-time carer. programme.desc: Hospital staff at Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham treat three female university students who have been victims of a spate of needle-spiking attacks. programme.title: Worlds Worst Natural Disasters
programme.desc: Documentary in which experts formulate a list of the 10 most significant natural disasters of all time. From historic floods and destructive fires to violent earthquakes, they reveal the key moments that led to human catastrophes, and prove that when it comes to chaos, Mother Nature reigns supreme. The programme also suggests that man can learn from past events to minimise their impact if and when they strike again

programme.desc: How Nazi Germany fostered air clubs to gain aerial supremacy, in violation of the Treaty of Versailles

programme.title: Secret Nazi Science
programme.desc: This episode explores Hitlers reluctance to use chemical weapons, and how research into pesticide research created the poison gas used to kill millions in the Holocaust

programme.title: Paranatural

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.sub-title: Revenant Skeleton, Spy Cam, Shakespearean Mangle
programme.desc: An ancient skeleton found in Poland with a blade across its stomach, a stone on its neck and a strange green colour in its mouth? Plus, a beautiful golden capsule the size of a large beach ball that supposedly helped prevent Armageddon, and a bulky wooden device that could prove that Shakespeare didnt really write his masterworks

programme.title: Bloody Tales of the Tower
programme.desc: Historian Suzannah Lipscomb and journalist Joe Crowley investigate stories connected to the Tower of London, looking at the contrasting fates of three people imprisoned in the Tower of London for treason. They examine what happened to Jesuit priest Fr John Gerard after he was accused of being sent by the pope to overthrow Elizabeth I, and look at the cases of Gunpowder Plot conspirator Guy Fawkes and German spy Josef Jakobs, who was captured in 1941 after breaking his ankle while parachuting into England on a mission

programme.title: Bloody Tales of the Tower
programme.desc: Tudor historian Suzannah Lipscomb and journalist Joe Crowley investigate the history of the Tower of London, examining stories that challenge accepted beliefs about the infamous prison using original historical sources and dramatic reconstructions. Here they consider why it took executioner John Ketch five blows to decapitate the Duke of Monmouth in July 1685, and examine whether former inmate Lady Jane Grey had a legitimate claim to the English throne. They also look into how a ragtag gang managed to breach its defences during the Peasants Revolt in June 1381 and killed Simon of Sudbury, the Archbishop of Canterbury

programme.title: Bloody Tales of the Tower
programme.desc: Suzannah Lipscomb and Joe Crowley examine the evidence and report on the intrigues that led to three royal deaths, detailing the sometimes salacious accusations levelled at Anne Boleyn, Catherine Howard and Lady Arabella Seymour. Henry VIIIs chief minister Thomas Cromwell informed the monarch of gossip about Anne and court musician Mark Smeaton, but allegations at her public trial included adultery with five men, incest with her brother George and treason. Rumours of relationships with distant cousin Francis Dereham and Thomas Culpeper led to Catherine Howards execution, while Lady Arabella, a serious threat to the ruling Stuart dynasty, is thought to have committed suicide against a backdrop of a cross-dressing noblewoman and two escapes from the Tower

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: After a Boeing 727s near-fatal nosedive over Michigan, investigators risk their own lives to determine why the plane fell out of the sky

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: When a two-billion-dollar Stealth Bomber crashes in Guam, it is up to the US Air Force to investigate the most expensive aviation accident of all time

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend take on a Mercedes SLK with huge sentimental value for owner Lili, but this stylish roadster hides major mysteries, from why wont it run, to why is its groundbreaking folding roof is stuck open. While Fuzz battles the workshop gremlins, Tim heads to Germany for answers, racing the clock towards a show-stopping West End reveal

programme.title: War Machine: World War II
programme.desc: Examining the weapons used on different battlegrounds during the Second World War, scrutinising their design, production, performance and their role in victory or defeat. During land warfare, every weapon was made to fill a specific need. Designed for a single purpose: to win the race for technological supremacy over the enemy. From handguns to tanks, the stakes were never greater

programme.title: War Machine: World War II
programme.desc: Exploring how naval warfare evolved from battleships to submarines, then into aircraft carriers and how pivotal battles in the Atlantic and Pacific hinged on megaship production. An examination of how control of supply lines shaped the war at sea

programme.title: War Machine: World War II
programme.desc: A look at how advancements in aeronautics and weaponry reshaped battle strategies in the Second World War, from bombers to fighters, witness the dawn of a new era as militaries vie for dominance in the skies

programme.title: War Machine: World War II
programme.desc: Investigating how crucial supply lines were in the Second World War for weapons, sustenance and medicine and how they defined the outcomes on the battlefield

programme.title: The Cure for Hate: Bearing Witness to Auschwitz
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on former skinhead and Holocaust denier Tony McAleer, who went on to become a founding member of the anti-hate activist group Life After Hate. Profoundly aware and deeply ashamed of the lineage of hate he once promoted, Tony visits the Auschwitz-Birkenau death camp in Poland in the spirit of tshuvah - to bear witness to the inconceivable ravages of the Holocaust, repent his wrongs, and deepen his personal work against the rise of extremist politics. Film-maker Peter Hutchison documents McAleers profoundly personal journey of atonement at Auschwitz

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: Ken Burns documentary sin which the inhabitants of communities in Alabama, California, Connecticut and Minnesota recall the effects of the Second World War on their lives. It begins with the 12 months before the attack on Pearl Harbour, which belatedly brought their country into the conflict that cost the lives of more than 50 million people worldwide

programme.title: The War
programme.sub-title: A Very Fearful Time: March 1942 - December 1942
programme.desc: Documentary examining how ordinary American citizens began to fear the worst when U-boats were found patrolling the United States east coast and few encouraging reports came through from early combat zones overseas, before the countrys navy finally started to halt Japans expansion in the Pacific

programme.title: The War
programme.sub-title: The Worst Is Yet to Come: January 1943 - June 1943

programme.title: The War
programme.sub-title: When Things Get Tough: July 1943 - December 1943
programme.desc: Recalling the American airmen who took on daylight bombing missions over the heart of Hitlers Germany, targeting the enemy in their homeland in spite of terrible odds of survival

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: The tiny Pacific atoll of Tarawa was occupied by the Japanese during World War Two, but was invaded by US Marines in November 1943. The programme recalls how after three days of intense fighting, and at a terrible cost to human life, the island was finally secured by the Americans

programme.title: The Hardacres
programme.desc: After an unfortunate accident befalls dock worker Sam Hardacre, he and his family lose their jobs at the docks and must race to find work or else end up on the streets. His wife Mary, daughter Liza and mother-in-law Ma venture to the gilded halls of country estate Thornton Hall in search of work. Family saga set in the 1890s, starring Claire Cooper and Liam McMahon

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands
programme.desc: Eoin Warner explores the wildlife of the countrys Atlantic islands in a 140-year-old Galway hooker fishing boat. programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine OClock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Architect Hugh Wallace helps Roscommon couple Mary Morris and Colm Dowd are creating their first home together - the Old Bank in Elphin. The residence is a neglected space that has allowed damp and mould to thrive. However, Mary and Colm have a vision that lets them see past all the moisture, allowing them to turn this behemoth of a building into not only into their home, but also their sanctuary

programme.title: Leonard and Hungry Paul
programme.desc: Thirty-something Leonards mother dies suddenly and he faces the world with fresh eyes, aware that if hes not careful, hes going to end up living a small life of complete insignificance. His long-term friend and fellow board game-lover Hungry Pauls own universe is exactly the size he wants it to be, but his mother insists he attend the local hospital alongside her as a volunteer visitor. Then, Leonard encounters office fire warden Shelley - who makes him smile for the first time in weeks. Alex Lawther, Laurie Kynaston and Jamie-Lee ODonnell star in this comedy adapted from Ronán Hessions novel and narrated by Julia Roberts

programme.title: The Week in Politics
programme.desc: Reflections on the political week, including contributions from journalists, senators and TDs. Hosted by Áine Lawlor

programme.title: The Tommy Tiernan Show

programme.title: Rebus
programme.desc: World-weary detective inspector John Rebus goes on the trail of a copycat serial killer, only to be taken off the case pending an inquiry into the death of a convicted murderer he helped put behind bars 15 years earlier. Crime drama based on the books by best-selling author Ian Rankin, starring John Hannah, Jim Norton, Ewan Stewart, Sara Stewart and Joanna Roth

programme.title: Lucan
programme.desc: The body of Sandra Rivett was discovered on November 7, 1974, and the chief suspect was Richard John Bingham, seventh earl of Lucan, the father of the children that Rivett was employed to care for as nanny. However, the earl disappeared and was never brought to justice. Thirty years after the event, Hampshire builder Neil Berriman discovered he was Sandra Rivetts biological son and began a search for the truth about the murder of his birth mother

programme.desc: Gabrielle Nevaeh and Louis McCartney dish on bringing the prequel play Stranger Things: The First Shadow to Broadway

programme.title: Herrhausen: The Banker and the Bomb
programme.desc: As the Eastern Blocs power declines, Alfred Herrhausen urges Deutsche Bank to prepare for the future

programme.title: Nightsleeper
programme.desc: A train is taken over by cyber terrorists on a night-time journey from Glasgow to London, leaving an off-duty cop on board to team up with the acting technical director at the National Cyber Security Centre in a bid to beat the bad guys. But with no idea of who they are fighting and a few other passengers who may not be as innocent as they look, it seems they are in for a long night. Real-time thriller, starring Joe Cole, Alexandra Roach, David Threlfall and Sharon Small

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Does Kerrie deserve a goodbye? Sonnys confronted by his new life. Mali sees through Holden

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Kerrie has a final surprise for Tane. Dana refuses to give up without a fight. Archies family come together

programme.title: Flip That Romance (2019)
programme.desc: Two rival renovators refurbish dual sides of a duplex and rekindle their feelings for one another. Romance, starring Julie Gonzalo and Tyler Hynes

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: When new vet Richard Carmody joins the practice, James feels his place by Siegfrieds side is threatened. Conflicts come to the surface at Mrs Pumphreys community tea party. Drama, starring Nicholas Ralph

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: James and Helen are keeping a secret, and following a visit to the Crabtrees Farm, Carmody is challenged with learning how to be a vet outside of his books. The new farmers have a worrying illness amongst their herd and James wants to help them in any way he can

programme.title: Paris: A Wild Story
programme.desc: Cameras follow creatures that stroll or soar through the French capital in search of food, some of them while the city sleeps

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon voyages across the Coral Triangle, a huge wilderness of tropical seas and jungle clad islands in the south-western Pacific, surrounded by the Philippines, Malaysia and Indonesia. It is one of the most beautiful and biodiverse corners of the words oceans and is crucial to the health of the wider marine environment, having been described as the Amazon of the seas

programme.title: Legendary Tigers of India
programme.desc: Documentary telling the epic 50-year story of an Indian tiger clan and its five most charismatic and powerful tigresses, who have revealed more about the lives of tigers than anyone thought possible. Their home is Ranthambhore in the northwestern Indian.state of Rajasthan, which is dominated by a huge, ancient fort and three crocodile-filled lakes teeming with tiger prey. Valmik Thapar has dedicated his life to following the big cats, witnessing some of the most remarkable tiger behaviour ever seen and filmed

programme.title: The Future of Nature
programme.desc: This episode examines how people can work with nature to make the world thrive

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Tsavo
programme.desc: In view of the onset of the dry season, it is a matter of sheer survival for all at the waterhole. When the rain returns, the eternal circle of becoming and passing is closed

programme.title: The Cleaner
programme.desc: Wicky is called to a wedding, where the bride is the daughter of none other than Brummie kingpin Bob Mammot, who heads up the biggest storage company in the Black Country. Unfortunately the fairy-tale day has been interrupted by a baseball bat attack on one of the guests. Wicky to clean up the mess - or risk facing the wrath of the storage kings terrifying wife Vivien. Dark comedy, starring Greg Davies, with Harry Peacock and Rebekah Staton

programme.title: Allianz League Sunday

programme.title: Life and Death Row
programme.desc: The documentary follows the final few weeks of the appeals process in Texas as Ramiro Gonzales desperately tries to have his execution overturned, while the family of his victims seek justice. In 2006, Ramiro Gonzales received the death penalty for kidnapping, raping and murdering a former classmate, 18-year-old Bridget Townsend, but in his appeals process, his supporters argue that the human brain only matures by a persons mid-twenties and he has now become a man of deep religious faith

programme.title: D-Day: The Unheard Tapes
programme.desc: The story of the bloody battle for Normandy that followed D-Day, narrated by soldiers on both sides and French witnesses, whose words are lip-synced by actors. Despite the hard-won foothold made on the coast, the Allies still faced their greatest challenge. As the British and the Americans respectively tried to take Caen and Cherbourg, Nazi troops began a regime of counterattacks, leaving the Allies bogged down amid the dense Normandy hedgerows

programme.title: Legendary Tigers of India
programme.desc: Documentary telling the epic 50-year story of an Indian tiger clan and its five most charismatic and powerful tigresses, who have revealed more about the lives of tigers than anyone thought possible. Their home is Ranthambhore in the northwestern Indian.state of Rajasthan, which is dominated by a huge, ancient fort and three crocodile-filled lakes teeming with tiger prey. Valmik Thapar has dedicated his life to following the big cats, witnessing some of the most remarkable tiger behaviour ever seen and filmed

programme.title: Midnight Movies: From the Margin to the Mainstream (2005)
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the success of six much-loved films, which became cult classics despite being made on a shoestring budget. Interviews with cast members, directors and fans reveal the secrets behind memorable productions such as George A Romeros zombie thriller Night of the Living Dead, the all-singing, all-dancing The Rocky Horror Picture Show, starring Tim Curry, and David Lynchs surreal and disturbing Eraserhead

programme.title: Greatest Albums Live
programme.desc: Artists perform the albums they believe made them and talk to Jo Whiley about influences, creative process and legacy, beginning with Dexys Midnight Runners

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: The making of Black Sabbaths second album Paranoid, which was released in 1970 and helped define the sound and style of heavy metal. The programme tells the story of how Ozzy Osbourne, Tony Iommi, Geezer Butler and Bill Ward created the record, and features contributions by Phil Alexander, Geoff Barton, Henry Rollins and Jim Simpson

programme.title: A Midsummer Nights Dream

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A well-dressed old man sells his umbrella claiming he needs money for the fare home - but then spends it in a pub. John Mills and Michael Gambon star

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A girl who is followed by a stranger seeks shelter with a kindly woman, but her troubles are far from over. Alfred Burke and Stephanie Cole star

programme.sub-title: The Orderly World of Mr Appleby
programme.desc: A woman learns her husband has killed off his three previous wives - forcing her to outwit him or become his next victim. Robert Lang and Elizabeth Spriggs star

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: An elderly woman is locked in an air-tight safe with one of her cats by her nieces husband when she discovers he is a forger. Drama, starring Patricia Collinge and Jessica Walter

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A commissioner of recreation and parks receives three life-threatening letters in one week, complaining about the method by which art is selected for museum display. Later, an unsuccessful artist is believed to be behind bomb threats. However, this proves to be a diversion tactic concealing a novel scheme to steal the artworks. Drama, starring Donnelly Rhodes and Lou Jacobi

programme.title: Beyond the Brush
programme.desc: Art historian Siân Walters and writer James Payne explore masterpieces, delving into the stories behind the canvas of the worlds most famous paintings. They beginning with Edvard Munchs The Scream, uncovering how anxiety, raw emotion and the fragile, ever-decaying nature of his paintings came together to create one of the most haunting works in history

programme.title: Beyond the Brush
programme.desc: Siân Walters and James Payne explore Vincent van Goghs The Starry Night, looking at how a turbulent mind, a bold vision, and a small view from an asylum window contributed to the creation of one of the most famous paintings in history

programme.title: Cats: The Musical
programme.desc: A production of Andrew Lloyd Webbers musical based on TS Eliots much-loved Old Possums Book of Practical Cats, filmed at the New London Theatre on Drury Lane. The cast includes Elaine Paige, John Mills, Ken Page, Rosemarie Ford and Michael Gruber

programme.title: Oklahoma! (1955)
programme.desc: A farm girl is torn between two very different suitors - a charming cowboy wandering through the territory and a brooding farmhand with a dark side to his nature. Meanwhile, another cattle driver has finally raised enough money to marry his sweetheart, only to find he has a rival. Rodgers and Hammersteins musical Western, with Gordon MacRae, Shirley Jones and Rod Steiger. Songs include Oh What a Beautiful Mornin and I Caint Say No

programme.title: Iconic Women of Country
programme.desc: Kathy Mattea, Trisha Yearwood and Wynonna Judd pay tribute to the female artists who inspired them, including Dolly Parton, Tammy Wynette, Patsy Cline and Loretta Lynn

programme.title: Roman Holiday (1953)
programme.desc: A princess tires of a tour of European capitals and runs away from her entourage while in Rome. An American newspaper reporter takes her under his wing in the hope of getting an exclusive, but as he shows her the sights of the city, he starts to fall in love with her. Romantic comedy, starring Audrey Hepburn, Gregory Peck, Eddie Albert and Harcourt Williams

programme.title: Elvis Presley: A Legend in Concert
programme.desc: A collection of the stars early TV appearances, featuring hits including Tutti Frutti, Love Me and Blue Suede Shoes, as well as a duet with Frank Sinatra. The programme also includes footage from his 1956 performance on The Milton Berle Show, where his pelvic gyrations caused uproar, and an appearance from later that year on The Steve Allen Show - where the host came up with a unique solution to counteract the singers supposedly threatening sexuality

programme.title: Sammy Davis Jr: Legends in Concert

programme.title: Coldplay: How We Saw the World - Live in Toronto

programme.title: Greatest Albums Live

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: Carly Simon talks about her 1972 album No Secrets, reflecting on her time with ex-husband James Taylor, a heroin addict when they first met. She also recounts her number of highly public affairs in the early 1970s and how her experience fed into the records most famous song, Youre So Vain, performing the missing fourth verse on the piano - the first time she has ever sung it along with the melody

programme.title: Classic FM Live: Classical Anthems

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected

programme.desc: When her husband goes away on a business trip, Mary Summers is all alone in her house and gripped with a nameless fear - then a patient who has escaped from an asylum breaks in

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents

programme.title: Stories from the National Portrait Gallery

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Rachel shares some harsh truths with Shane and confides in Belinda. Armond goes on an all-out bender and exacts the ultimate revenge on his nemesis

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Shae sneaks into Tyrions chamber to tell him Ros warned her about Baelishs interest in Sansa, who goes to tea with Margaery and her grandmother Lady Olenna and is encouraged to speak freely about Joffrey. Jaime passes the time by taunting his escort Brienne, Arya encounters outlaw group the Brotherhood Without Banners, while Lord Karstark makes Robb aware he no longer has faith in him. Fantasy drama, guest starring Diana Rigg

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion assumes new responsibilities, Jon is taken to the imposing Fist of the First Men, and Jaime strikes a deal with his captors. Meanwhile, Daenerys meets with the slavers as she moves to build an army. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: And Now His Watch Is Ended
programme.desc: The men of the Nights Watch become increasingly hostile to Craster, and Arya is brought before the commander of the Brotherhood Without Banners. Across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys takes charge of her army of the Unsullied, while in Kings Landing, Cersei tells her father that Margaery is manipulating Joffrey, and Varys meets his match when he talks to Lady Olenna. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire series of novels, starring Maisie Williams, Conleth Hill and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Teenager Logan starts work as an apprentice deck-hand, while landlady Pat recalls fond memories from her life in Brixham

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor explores Berlin, visiting the arty Propeller Island City Lodge - a hotel where guests can fulfil their fantasies by sleeping in lion cages, coffins or rotating beds. At the Schlosshotel in affluent Grunewald, cabaret dancer Romy Haag talks to Richard about her affair with David Bowie, who stayed at the hotel while living in the German capital in the 1970s

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to New Orleans and meets soul singer Irma Thomas at the Hotel de Monteleone, an establishment that was popular with writers such as Tennessee Williams, F Scott Fitzgerald and Ernest Hemingway. Richard speaks to Steel Magnolias author Robert Harling about the Soniat House, check into the supposedly haunted Hotel Maison de Ville and talks to burlesque dancer Chrissy Owens at the Roosevelt

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony suffers a bout of food poisoning and begins to experience weird hallucinations. Meadow graduates from secondary school, and Christopher receives some welcome news. Gritty drama series, starring James Gandolfini, Lorraine Bracco and Edie Falco

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The Hound is judged by the gods, while Jaime receives a different form of justice at the hands of men. Robb is betrayed, Jon proves himself and Tyrion learns the true cost of a wedding. Fantasy drama, starring Richard Madden, Kit Harington and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Lord Tywin plans strategic unions for the Lannisters, Melisandre visits the Riverlands and Robb weighs up a compromise to repair his alliance with House Frey. Roose Bolton decides what to do with Jaime, while Jon, Ygritte and the wildlings face a daunting climb. Fantasy drama, starring Charles Dance

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: The Bear and the Maiden Fair
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Sansa frets about her prospects, Tyrions new situation agitates Shae, and Tywin counsels the king. Daenerys exchanges gifts with a slave lord outside Yunkai, Melisandre reveals a secret to Robert Baratheons illegitimate son Gendry, and Brienne faces a formidable foe at Harrenhal. Emilia Clarke and Peter Dinklage star in an episode written by George RR Martin, whose novels form the basis for the series

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Daenerys and her entourage discover Yunkais powerful friends are the Second Sons, an elite army of mercenaries. Determined to take the city and increase the strength of her own forces, the queen agrees to meet the sellsword companys captains - intending to make them a better offer. Meanwhile, Davos is still desperate to make Stannis see clearly and demands to see proof of Melisandres power. There is a wedding in Kings Landing, and beyond the Wall, Sam and Gilly have a chilling encounter with a foe that seems to have come straight from their nightmares. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke and Liam Cunningham

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Robb and his bannermen gather at the Twins in the northern Riverlands to attend the wedding of Lord Edmure Tully and Roslin Frey, daughter of Lord Walder. Elsewhere, Jon faces his harshest test to date, Daario and Ser Jorah debate how to take Yunkai, and Bran discovers a new gift. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire novels, starring Richard Madden, Michelle Fairley and David Bradley

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The various warring factions of Westeros receive news of the events of the wedding at the Twins. In Kings Landing, Joffrey stands up to his grandfather Tywin, Daenerys discovers whether shell be remembered as a conqueror or a liberator in Yunkai, and mercy comes from a surprising source in Dragonstone. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke, Charles Dance and Jack Gleeson

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion is sent out to welcome a royal party from Dorne outside the walls of Kings Landing, and Jon Snow finds himself on trial at Castle Black over his time with the wildlings and the death of Qhorin Halfhand. Daenerys heads toward the slave city of Meereen, and Arya runs into a familiar face. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, the day of King Joffreys wedding to Margaery Tyrell arrives, and while the sadistic monarch delights in tormenting his uncle Tyrion, the capitals various factions plot further alliances. However, all attention is drawn back to Joffrey following the arrival of a pie filled with live birds. Meanwhile, Melisandre oversees a sacrifice to the Lord of Light at Dragonstone as three traitors are burned at the stake, and the future continues to look grim for Theon as Ramsay Snow finds a use for him. North of the Wall, Bran sees clearly where he and his friends must go after experiencing a series of visions

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Ser Dontos spirits Sansa out of Kings Landing and rows her out to a waiting ship, and Pod gives Tyrion news of his forthcoming trial. Tywin counsels Tommen on what makes a good king and also has an offer for Oberyn Martell. Sam decides Castle Black is not a safe places for Gilly, while Jon proposes a bold plan after the wildlings send a chilling message. Across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys picks a champion to take on the best that Meereen has to offer and Davos has an idea about raising funds for Stanniss cause

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Jaime finally visits Tyrion in jail after some persuasion from Bronn, and he also has a mission for Brienne. Daenerys tries to balance justice and mercy in Meereen. At Castle Black, Jon asks for volunteers when Ser Alliser decides to let him go to Crasters Keep to deal with the mutineers. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Kit Harrington

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Cersei and Tywin plot the next move for the Lannisters and the Crown after Tommens coronation, while Ser Jorah gives Daenerys worrying news about the situations in Yunkai and Astapor. Jon and his band of volunteers mount a raid on the mutineers at Crasters Keep, and Sansa and Littlefinger arrive at the Eyrie. Fantasy drama, starring Lena Headey, Charles Dance, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Alcaras turns his attention to the recent Chicago marathon, while Peter takes matters into his own hands. Mystery thriller based on the book by Andrea Mara, starring Sarah Snook

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: When Detective Plumb discovers that Carol has lied about key details of her affair, she presses Homer to let her question Clark. Once in the hot seat, unsettling truths about Clarks relationships with both Floyd and Carol begin to come to light

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: The Laws of Gods and Men
programme.desc: Stannis and Davos arrive in Braavos for their meeting with the Iron Bank, but find Tycho Nestoris (Mark Gatiss) a hard man to do business with. Yara Greyjoy leads a band of Ironborn on a mission to rescue her brother Theon, while Daenerys meets with supplicants in Meereen. In Kings Landing, Tyrions trial begins in the throne room and he is stunned by the identity of one of the crowns witnesses. Fantasy drama, starring Stephen Dillane and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion enlists an unlikely ally, while Daario entreats Daenerys to allow him to do what he does best. Jons warnings about the Walls vulnerability fall on deaf ears, while Brienne and Pod follow a new lead as they continues their mission to track down the Stark girls. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Kit Harington and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrions fate is decided as his champion Oberyn Martell faces against Gregor the Mountain Clegane in his trial by combat, while Moles Town is on the receiving end of a raid by the wildlings. Ramsay sends Theon into Moat Cailin to negotiate the surrender of the Ironborn troops holding the fort, Littlefinger and Sansa are questioned about the circumstances surrounding Lysas death and Barristan confronts Jorah about a document delivered to him. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.sub-title: Missouri Mutual Life and Health Insurance Company
programme.desc: Eager to please, Clark ramps up his support for Floyds health and financial wellness, while Carol makes her lover swear to secrecy

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The men of the Nights Watch face their biggest challenge yet as they prepare to defend the Wall and Castle Black against attacks from the north and south by Mance Rayders wildling army, with Ygritte determined to be the one to kill Jon Snow. Sam gets some sage advice about love from Maester Aemon and is shocked when someone comes knocking at the gates seeking shelter. Fantasy drama, starring Kit Harington and directed by Neil Marshall, the man behind the second series episode depicting the Battle of the Blackwater

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham hosts its annual Pirate Festival, paying tribute to Devons colourful maritime history, while fisherman Nathan sets off in search of a lucrative catch

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Fish merchant Robert and his wife Kelly decide to open a seafood restaurant in Brixham - but their determinedly contemporary approach to cuisine leaves some locals unimpressed. The programme also follows the journey of a turbot over 36 hours, as it is caught and auctioned off before being served in an exclusive London restaurant

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to Tokyo and checks out the Park Hyatt, the hotel featured in the film Lost in Translation, and goes behind the closed doors of the Japanese capitals love hotels. In the fashionable district of Meguro, Richard takes in the Claska, which was the citys first boutique hotel and has its own canine beauty salon

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the citys biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon Snow heads into the wildling camp to try to negotiate a peace with Mance Rayder, but an unexpected arrival changes the situation at the Wall, while Daenerys is forced to make a decision about the dragons in Meereen. Cersei demands that Tywin call off her engagement to Loras Tyrell, Bran learns more about his destiny, and Tyrion receives a visit from Jaime as he awaits his fate. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire series of novels, starring Peter Dinklage and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: At Castle Black, Jon Snow struggles to mediate between wildling leader Mance Rayder and Stannis Baratheon, while a mournful Cersei continues to worry about the future of her son Tommen in Kings Landing. Tyrion arrives in a new location and is presented with a fresh opportunity and Daenerys grapples with the politics of power in Meereen, as well as her tempestuous dragons. Starring Kit Harington, Lena Headey, Peter Dinklage and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: The House of Black and White
programme.desc: Arya arrives in Braavos, while Brienne and Pod run into trouble on the road, and Cersei fears for her daughters safety in Dorne as Ellaria Sand seeks revenge for her lover Oberyns death. Stannis has a proposal for Jon and an advisor tempts Daenerys. Fantasy drama, starring Maisie Williams, Lena Headey and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Queen Margaery spends time with her new husband King Tommen. Elsewhere, fugitive Tyrion and Varys walk the Long Bridge of Volantis, and in Braavos, Arya sees the Many-Faced God. Fantasy drama, starring Natalie Dormer and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The militant arm of the Faith of the Seven grows more aggressive, Jaime and Bronn head south and Ellaria and the Sand Snakes vow vengeance

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon enlists the help of an unexpected ally, Daenerys makes a difficult decision in Mereen, Brienne searches for Sansa, and Theon remains under Ramsays control

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Arya continues her training at the House of Black and White, Jorah and Tyrion run into slavers and the Sand Snakes mount an attack. Fantasy, starring Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon prepares for conflict, Sansa tries to talk to Theon, and Brienne waits for a sign. Elsewhere, Jaime attempts to reconnect with his family

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Arya makes progress in her training, Sansa confronts an old friend, Cersei faces a struggle and Jon embarks on a journey. Fantasy drama, starring Lena Headey

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Westeros, Jon returns to the Wall from his controversial ranging mission, and Stannis faces a difficult decision. Fantasy drama, starring Kit Harington, Stephen Dillane, Maisie Williams and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The High Sparrow and his militant followers appear to have made an indelible mark on Kings Landing as Cersei finds herself seeking forgiveness. Starring Kit Harington, Emilia Clarke, Lena Headey and Stephen Dillane

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra oversteps at the Small Council, while Viserys is urged to secure the succession through a new marriage and Daemon announces his intentions

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra continues her search for a suitable match, while Daemon returns to Kings Landing and stirs more trouble for the king. Rhaenyra learns a valuable lesson

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Daemon visits his wife in the Vale, while Viserys and Rhaenyra broker agreements with the Velaryons, and Alicent seeks the truth about the princess

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: August arrives and the fishermen of Brixham spend time ashore with their families as their boats are repaired - but summer proves costly for Jan, who loses £1,000 for every day his vessel is out of action. programme.title: Urban Secrets

programme.desc: Alan Cumming tours the less-celebrated sights of Brighton, beginning by visiting the Toy and Model Museum to look at its collection of model trains. He then discovers a boutique that sells a variety of unusual items, before taking a glimpse behind the scenes at the Royal Pavilion
